Accenture Strategy and Consulting
Industries Functions Leaders
Industries Functions Leaders

Accenture Strategy and Consulting

Reinvention is continuous. Together, we create measurable value at scale.

Reinvention starts here

An unprecedented rate of change in technology, data and AI—including generative AI, fast-shifting consumer preferences and evolving workforce dynamics call for businesses in every industry to innovate and rapidly transform. How you compete. How you define and deliver value. How you create greater agility and operational excellence. How you define new talent strategies. In short, how you reinvent to be the next best version of yourself.

83%

of organizations have accelerated their transformation.

Accenture Strategy and Consulting professionals stand ready to work with you to navigate your reinvention journey.

Reinventing across industries

We believe reinvention requires industry-specific knowledge and insights to happen at the speed required today.

  • Communications and Media
  • High Tech
  • Software and Platforms
  • Banking
  • Capital Markets
  • Insurance
  • Health
  • Public Service
  • Aerospace and Defense
  • Automotive
  • Consumer Goods and Services
  • Industrial
  • Life Sciences
  • Retail
  • Travel
  • Chemicals
  • Energy
  • Natural Resources
  • Utilities

The advantage of a boundaryless approach to reinvention

The future enterprise requires fundamentally reinventing cross-functional processes and ways of working to streamline operations, enhance experience and accelerate innovation.

  • Strategy
  • Digital Engineering and Manufacturing
  • Finance and Risk Management
  • Infrastructure and Capital Projects
  • Supply Chain
  • Sustainability
  • Talent and Organization

Together, we reinvented

Julie Sweet meets with the CEOs of some of the world’s most iconic brands to talk about their reinvention journey.
